nasb.text: six of their names on the one stone and the names of the remaining six on the other stone, according to their birth.

esv.text: six of their names on the one stone, and the names of the remaining six on the other stone, in the order of their birth.

cnv.text: 六個名字在一塊寶石上，其餘六個名字在另一塊寶石上，都是照著他們出生的次序。

ccb.text: 按他们的长幼次序，每一块宝石刻上六个名字。
